prompt: A vertical A4 poster in the style of a high-end Japanese business magazine cover. At the center is a character representing the 'ENTJ COMMANDER'. An image of an 'intelligent Japanese man in his 40s' who blends the roles of a tax accountant, entrepreneur, and AI instructor. He holds a tablet in one hand, surrounded by motifs of AI networks, data flows, real estate, seminar stages, and educational content. The background features a futuristic city and a digital workspace. At the top, the catchphrase 'Pioneer of the AI Era'. On the left and right are organized infographics. The content includes 'Strengths: Strategic thinking, execution, learning speed, systematization, communication' and 'Notes: Over-committing, dispersion, easily bored'. At the bottom is a radar chart showing E60 I40 / N85 S15 / T70 F30 / J60 P40. Sophisticated typography, luxurious feel, full color, quality of a magazine feature cover, with a focus on information design, in a composition where the personality can be understood at a glance.
